Meta.Documentation: An attachment by value or by reference. An attachment complements the description of an element, for example through a document, a video, a picture.
Unique identifier for this particular attachment
URI for this Attachment format: uri
Attachment type such as video, picture
The actual contents of the attachment object, if embedded, encoded as base64 format: base64
A narrative text describing the content of the attachment
Attachment mime type such as extension file for video, picture and document
Uniform Resource Locator, is a web page address (a subset of URI) format: uri
When sub-classing, this defines the super-class
A URI to a JSON-Schema file that defines additional attributes and relationships format: uri
When sub-classing, this defines the sub-class Extensible name
The actual type of the target instance when needed for disambiguation.
